list.title: Tool Configuration
list.subtitle: Manage tool metadata, execution config, and enabled status
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete tool "{{name}}"?
list.empty: No tools configured yet. Click "New Tool" to create one.

edit.title: Edit Tool
edit.idHint: Unique identifier, cannot be changed after creation
edit.name: Tool Name *
edit.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the tool's purpose and functionality...
edit.enabledHint: When disabled, agents cannot use this tool
edit.configPlaceholder: Fill in config based on execution type
edit.builtinReadOnlyFields: Schema and description of built-in tools are defined in code. Edits are for reference only and do not affect tool behavior.
edit.builtinFieldsLocked: Built-in tool schemas are defined in code and cannot be edited here
edit.httpConfigHint: HTTP config: url, method, headers, queryParams, bodyTemplate, timeoutMs, responsePath
edit.mcpConfigHint: MCP config: serverUrl, serverName, remoteToolName, authToken
